features: 【VARIETY OF POPULAR PATTERNS】From 60pcs cartoon character series stickers that children like. Different tattoo designs provide a wide range of options for kids. Children can choose their favorite designs at different times, and there are multiple choices for the image of each character！

【SAFETY TO USE】High-quality face and body stickers are free of harmful substances and are safe for the skin. Easy to use, the back of the template is easy to peel off, and it will not hurt people when it is removed from the skin. You will have a variety of novel and cute cartoon temporary tattoos.

【EASY TO USE】Cut out your favorite tattoo and stick it on the skin, moisten the tattoo with water, and wait for 10 seconds. Then gently tear off the white surface. Luminous tattoos need to be activated for a few minutes under the light, which can make them more luminous in the dark.

【WATERPROOF DESIGN】Temporary tattoos will last for several days and maintain their shiny appearance, so you can wear them at beach or pool parties throughout the summer. Colored luminous temporary tattoos can be affixed to arms, collarbone, back of hands, legs, suitable for any season.

【A GOOD GIFT FOR KIDS】Funny luminous tattoo sticker are very suitable for theme parties, you can use it to create your own patterns. This is a great gift for children, friends and family. It is beautiful and colorful, very suitable as a filling for party bags!
description: Product Description Popular Party Decorations for Kids Great for kids birthday decorations, party bags fillers, birthday party supplies Excellent Prize for Students Can be used as prize/reward in class games to encourage students Ideal Gift for Kids If you're sending this as a present or gift, it will be surprise for kids! Suitable for Various Festivals & Theme Parties Our products contain various themed series, Perfect for all festivals - St Patricks Day, Carnival, Easter, Halloween, Christmas, and so on. 100% Safe & Non-toxic Made of Non-Toxic material, it is harmless and safe for human-body to touch, non itchy and caused no irritation, please no worry to use. Promote Parent-child Relationship Playing with kids, more conducive for promoting parent-child relationships. Tool for Learning/Playing Kids can spell the tattoo in different stories according different pattern features, enhance they creativity and imagination, also keep them away electronic products and make more chance for healthy play!
